description: Remove all tier 3 (self-hosted) related code from Lightfriend. Tier 3 allowed users to run their own backend instance with IP validation and magic login. KEEP all BYOT (Bring Your Own Twilio) functionality - that is separate from tier 3.
rules: Do NOT remove database migrations - only document fields that could be cleaned later
Keep tier 1, tier 1.5, and tier 2 functionality working
KEEP all BYOT (Bring Your Own Twilio) code - users providing their own Twilio credentials is NOT tier 3
KEEP Textbee integration - that is NOT tier 3
KEEP /api/sms/server endpoints - those are for BYOT users
Keep code compiling after each task
Append progress to RALPH_PROGRESS.txt after each task

tasks.title: Search and document all tier 3 self-hosted code locations
tasks.description: Search for tier 3, tier3, self-hosted, self_hosted, selfhosted, magic_login, server_ip patterns. Document all files and line numbers in RALPH_PROGRESS.txt. DO NOT include BYOT or Textbee code.

tasks.title: Remove magic login system
tasks.description: Remove magic login handlers, temporary token generation for self-hosted setup, and magic login frontend pages/components

tasks.title: Remove server_ip validation
tasks.description: Remove IP address validation logic for self-hosted users (server_ip field usage), but keep the database field (migration cleanup later)

tasks.title: Remove tier 3 subscription tier option
tasks.description: Remove tier 3 from subscription tier enums/constants, remove tier == 3 conditionals that enable self-hosted features. Keep BYOT checks separate.

tasks.title: Remove tier 3 frontend UI
tasks.description: Remove tier 3 signup flows, self-hosted configuration pages, and tier 3 specific settings sections. Keep BYOT UI.

tasks.title: Clean up imports and dead code
tasks.description: Remove unused imports after tier 3 code removal, run cargo check to verify no compile errors

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md documentation
tasks.description: Remove tier 3 self-hosted references from CLAUDE.md and other documentation files. Keep BYOT documentation.

tasks.title: Final verification
tasks.description: Run cargo build --release in backend, trunk build in frontend, verify no tier 3 self-hosted references remain except in migrations. Verify BYOT still works.
